  "findings": [
    "Cable tray is being used as a walkway, creating an immediate fall hazard and risk of structural collapse of the tray system."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately.",
    "Instruct personnel to step off the cable tray and use approved scaffolding, ladders, or work platforms.",
    "Inspect the cable tray and its supports for structural damage or deformation before work resumes."
  ],
  "rationale": "Using cable tray as a walkway is a severe safety violation that can lead to structural failure of the tray, damage to cables, and serious fall injuries. Cable trays are designed solely for supporting electrical conductors and cables, not as pedestrian walkways.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 392",
    "OSHA 1926.501"
  ]
